theme: adaptive road tolling to steer commuter flow
title: Anticipatory Tolls: Steering the Commuter Equilibrium
strategies: do nothing: post zero toll every round and let the crowd's own best-response dynamic settle wherever it settles
reactive congestion pricing: each round, tax every edge in proportion to how much its LAST-round latency exceeded the currently-cheapest edge, chasing whichever edge is hot right now

anticipatory marginal-cost pricing: solve for the system-optimal flow split up front (equalize marginal cost across edges via water-filling), then post the one constant toll per edge that makes that split a fixed point of the crowd's own best-response rule

seeded local search over toll schedules: start from a constructive schedule (e.g. the marginal-cost one) and perturb per-round, per-edge tolls to squeeze out further reductions in total realized travel time
